default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly leadership meeting to discuss operational challenges, client management, and strategic initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/8Dheym85kBrLidvxUR7a9DDZFq-dcYuV?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Urgent need to update and maintain client artifacts, especially for AIMBIT](https://fathom.video/share/8Dheym85kBrLidvxUR7a9DDZFq-dcYuV?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Strategy sprints are effective but require careful resource management](https://fathom.video/share/8Dheym85kBrLidvxUR7a9DDZFq-dcYuV?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [PSEO offerings need clear definition and packaging for upsell opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/8Dheym85kBrLidvxUR7a9DDZFq-dcYuV?tab=summary&timestamp=42.0)
  - [Design and client ops processes require streamlining and potentially additional staffing](https://fathom.video/share/8Dheym85kBrLidvxUR7a9DDZFq-dcYuV?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)

## Topics

### Client Artifact Management

  - [Directors failing to update client artifacts, causing issues with client expectations](https://fathom.video/share/8Dheym85kBrLidvxUR7a9DDZFq-dcYuV?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [AIMBIT artifacts particularly problematic, requiring immediate attention](https://fathom.video/share/8Dheym85kBrLidvxUR7a9DDZFq-dcYuV?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
  - [Need for a systematic approach to artifact updates and maintenance](https://fathom.video/share/8Dheym85kBrLidvxUR7a9DDZFq-dcYuV?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)

### Strategy Sprints and Resource Allocation

  - [Strategy sprints proving effective but creating resource constraints](https://fathom.video/share/8Dheym85kBrLidvxUR7a9DDZFq-dcYuV?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)
  - [Sydney, Nem, and Matthew pulled in to support sprints](https://fathom.video/share/8Dheym85kBrLidvxUR7a9DDZFq-dcYuV?tab=summary&timestamp=1719.0)
  - [Plans to transition Ada back to front-end implementations after 6-8 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/8Dheym85kBrLidvxUR7a9DDZFq-dcYuV?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)
  - [Considering bringing Kyle into sprint leadership in August](https://fathom.video/share/8Dheym85kBrLidvxUR7a9DDZFq-dcYuV?tab=summary&timestamp=1875.0)

### PSEO Offerings and Upsells

  - [PSEO identified as a key area for upsell opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/8Dheym85kBrLidvxUR7a9DDZFq-dcYuV?tab=summary&timestamp=42.0)
  - [Current PSEO offerings not clearly defined or standardized](https://fathom.video/share/8Dheym85kBrLidvxUR7a9DDZFq-dcYuV?tab=summary&timestamp=1809.0)
  - [Jason to take ownership of shaping PSEO work stream into cohesive, tiered offerings](https://fathom.video/share/8Dheym85kBrLidvxUR7a9DDZFq-dcYuV?tab=summary&timestamp=2534.0)
  - [Potential tiers: blog posts, templated pages, directories/hubs, and tools/calculators](https://fathom.video/share/8Dheym85kBrLidvxUR7a9DDZFq-dcYuV?tab=summary&timestamp=2552.0)

### Client Management and Expectations

  - [Issues with overpromising features without proper internal stakeholder checks](https://fathom.video/share/8Dheym85kBrLidvxUR7a9DDZFq-dcYuV?tab=summary&timestamp=2078.0)
  - [Need for better calibration of client expectations, especially for high-value accounts](https://fathom.video/share/8Dheym85kBrLidvxUR7a9DDZFq-dcYuV?tab=summary&timestamp=2527.0)
  - [Importance of maintaining trust and delivering on promises (e.g., Smith design issues)](https://fathom.video/share/8Dheym85kBrLidvxUR7a9DDZFq-dcYuV?tab=summary&timestamp=2965.0)

### Design and Client Ops Processes

  - [Hiring Kadia next week to focus on graphics production and workflow optimization](https://fathom.video/share/8Dheym85kBrLidvxUR7a9DDZFq-dcYuV?tab=summary&timestamp=3001.0)
  - [Plans to hire another design engineer for client ops](https://fathom.video/share/8Dheym85kBrLidvxUR7a9DDZFq-dcYuV?tab=summary&timestamp=3033.0)
  - [Potential need for a dedicated PM-like role to manage complex client requests and expectations](https://fathom.video/share/8Dheym85kBrLidvxUR7a9DDZFq-dcYuV?tab=summary&timestamp=3100.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Matthew to prioritize updating AIMBIT artifacts immediately](https://fathom.video/share/8Dheym85kBrLidvxUR7a9DDZFq-dcYuV?tab=summary&timestamp=1304.0)
  - [Jason to shape PSEO work stream into clear, tiered offerings](https://fathom.video/share/8Dheym85kBrLidvxUR7a9DDZFq-dcYuV?tab=summary&timestamp=2534.0)
  - [Andi to shadow client calls and identify upsell opportunities with directors](https://fathom.video/share/8Dheym85kBrLidvxUR7a9DDZFq-dcYuV?tab=summary&timestamp=979.0)
  - [Kyle to follow up on Galileo upsell opportunity and add team members to relevant threads](https://fathom.video/share/8Dheym85kBrLidvxUR7a9DDZFq-dcYuV?tab=summary&timestamp=2245.0)
  - [Renn to onboard Kadia and new design hire, focusing on streamlining design processes](https://fathom.video/share/8Dheym85kBrLidvxUR7a9DDZFq-dcYuV?tab=summary&timestamp=3100.0)
  - [Leadership to consider hiring additional PM-type role for complex client request management](https://fathom.video/share/8Dheym85kBrLidvxUR7a9DDZFq-dcYuV?tab=summary&timestamp=2722.0)

action_items.description: Regenerate and update artifacts for AIMBIT, integrating feedback from recent calls
Collaborate with Matthew on updating AIMBIT artifacts
Add Kyle as host for next week's event to enable inviting prospects
Shadow client calls and meet directors individually to identify upsell opportunities
Follow up with Connor re: Galileo upsell opportunity, add Andi to thread
Shape PSEO workflow into cohesive, tiered offering with clear deliverables for each tier
